name: utopia-hooks
description: Flutter state management with utopia_hooks. Screen/State/View pattern, hook catalog, global state, async/pagination patterns, app bootstrap, global error handling, navigation conventions, hook-state testing, and convention analysis via utopia_cli.

interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through Utopia Flutter apps built with utopia_hooks: Screen/State/View, global state, async flows, pagination, navigation, DI, testing, and convention analysis through utopia_cli.
